n: Chapter 6.4: The Temple and the Tower

steps.t: Sirgon has come as near to the ruined temple of Sauron as he wishes.
The wreckage of Calatirion on the hill of Kharn Arâx can be found to the south-west.
Legolas looks up at the wreckage of Calatirion, musing about what he has been told of its history.
Your crew plans to meet on the road to Umbar Baharbêl, and you should join them.
Daxamat stands by the road to Umbar Baharbêl with the rest of your crew.
